vibe_and_concept: An editorial, magazine-like travel and food discovery app ('Scout'). It replaces generic grids with a cinematic, highly curated aesthetic. Bold typography, high-contrast text against warm natural backgrounds. Uses AI as a 'Copilot', with technical/data elements using monospaced fonts to contrast the elegant editorial serifs.

typography.heading_strategy: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for large text. Avoid centering. Emphasize asymmetric left-aligned text.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl font-light tracking-tight font-serif text-stone-900

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding: p-6, p-8, p-12 for sections to give breathing room. Avoid claustrophobic margins.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid: Asymmetrical layout using grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 or gap-8. Hero images span col-span-8, side summary panels span col-span-4.
layout_and_spacing.borders: 1px solid border-stone-200. No heavy shadows. Use soft diffuse shadows (shadow-sm or shadow-md) only on floating elements like nav or AI toasts.
layout_and_spacing.radii: Subtle rounded corners: rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Avoid full pills except for small tags or badges.

components.search_bar: Floating glassmorphism search bar with Phosphor icons. Large input text. An elegant pill or unified block, not a standard box.
components.place_card: Image-heavy card. Image takes up 60-70% of card height. Clean sans-serif details below. Sentiment score represented as a monospaced badge e.g. [ 9.2/10 ].
components.detail_page_hero: Large cinematic hero image taking up 50-60vh. Text overlaid with gradient bg-gradient-to-t from-stone-900/80 to-transparent, or image side-by-side with text.
components.ai_summary_card: A bento box container. Title 'The Verdict' in serif. Bullet points with custom icons. Font-mono for 'Confidence Score' and AI metadata.
components.video_proof_section: Horizontal scrolling list of video thumbnails (aspect-video) with reviewer avatars and quotes overlaid.
components.sentiment_bar: Minimalist straight lines. Positive (Deep Olive) and Negative (Terracotta). No chunky default progress bars.
components.category_chips: Minimalist outline chips (border-stone-300 text-stone-600), hover:bg-stone-900 hover:text-white transition-colors.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Subtle scale up (scale-[1.02]) on image hover. Text color darkens on hover. Use ease-out duration-300.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade in and slight upward translation (translate-y-4 to 0 opacity-100).
motion_and_interactions.loading_states: Avoid generic spinners. Use kinetic text-based loading (e.g., 'Analyzing 245 YouTube Comments...') in font-mono.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images has sufficient shadow or gradient overlay.
accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY: Apply data-testid to all interactive elements, buttons, and forms (e.g. data-testid='search-input', data-testid='place-card-1').

icons_library: @phosphor-icons/react (Use Light or Regular weight to match the elegant serif typography).
instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies via yarn: framer-motion, @phosphor-icons/react, lucide-react, clsx, tailwind-merge.
Inject Google Fonts in the main index.html: Playfair Display, Manrope, and JetBrains Mono.
Configure Tailwind spacing and font families in tailwind.config.js to match these guidelines.
Ensure the global body background is #F7F5F0 (Warm Beige) to establish the editorial feel.
Do NOT use pure white for the global background. Reserve pure white (#FFFFFF) strictly for elevated cards or bento boxes.
In the place details view, use a Bento Grid layout (e.g. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 or 4) to present the AI summary, sentiment, and video sources.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements as it is critical for testing.
Write .js (ES6+) files for React components, no TypeScript (.tsx). Use prop-types if necessary, but keep it simple.
